Overrides.Override: 15% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills Auras from your Skills which affect Allies also affect Enemies Limited to 1 Runegraft of Treachery
Your Lucky or Unlucky effects are instead Unexciting Limited to 1 Runegraft of Stability
Arcane Surge also grants 15% increased Life Regeneration Rate to you Limited to 1 Runegraft of Resurgence
